title: astragalus berteroi
intro: Astragalus berteroi, also known as the Puerto Rico milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties. Astragalus berteroi is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Herbal preparations of Astragalus berteroi may be found in the form of tea, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and resilience to illness.
